meta.name: CFA Level I Deck
meta.author: htheanh2000
meta.description: Editorial-textbook style for teaching CFA Level I in Vietnamese. Navy-ink on warm paper, serif display, monotype labels. Shared deck infrastructure with the IELTS project — only the theme tokens in cfa-theme.css differ.

_usage.accent: eyebrow, mono-labels, section-break band, highlight key
_usage.paper: long-read blocks (passages, example cards) — cream, not white

accentEdge.usage: col-card top, ex-card left, section stat-row top

inspirations: Schweser / Wiley CFA Study Guides (but more generous whitespace)
Penguin Modern Classics covers — navy + cream restraint
Financial Times Lex column — serif display, mono data
principles: One paper. One ink. Navy for signal, grays for hierarchy. No secondary brand colors.
Bilingual by design — English term = source of truth, Vietnamese = interpretation. Both present on first mention, English alone thereafter.
Monotype for technical labels (standards I-VII, formulas, axes). Serif slab for prose and headings.
Every slide answers a single question. If it takes two questions, split it.
Whitespace > density. A slide with one concept + one illustration beats a slide with four.
Vocabulary is content, not afterthought — each lesson ends with a vocab-grid the student can screenshot.
doNot: No drop shadows, no rounded corners, no gradients.
No emoji or decorative icons — mono symbols (→, §, ✓) only.
No accent color other than navy. Don't add 'alert red' or 'success green'.
No multi-column prose — single column with generous margins.
No Vietnamese in technical labels (keep Standards / mono labels in English for exam parity).

slideTemplates.name: exam-focus
slideTemplates.usage: Accented sidebar with exam weighting + tips

slideTemplates.name: vocab
slideTemplates.usage: Bilingual term list (EN term, VN meaning)

newLesson.clone: Copy ethics/lesson/1/index.html, update <title>, chrome labels, slide content only.
newLesson.chromeVars: Top-left chrome per slide: 'ETHICS · 01.01' → change subject code + module.lesson for your new lesson.

steps: Update root index.html (landing) to link the new lesson
Subjects map to CFA L1 topic areas: ethics, quant, econ, fsa, corp, port, equity, fixedincome, deriv, alt

files: deck-stage.js  — web component (kept in sync with IELTS repo)
deck-styles.css — design tokens (kept in sync with IELTS repo)
cfa-theme.css  — navy token overrides (this repo only)
sharedAssets.linkOrder: <link deck-styles.css> BEFORE <link cfa-theme.css> so the overrides win.
